creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Boris Korzun from comment #2)
If I'm reading the release note properly, yes, you're not upgrading from a release from 2020, so the note doesn't apply. And even if it did, 2021.04.06.23.11.00 is prior to 2021-05-11T23-27-41, so there shouldn't be an issue, afaict.
